Genetics, biogeography, ecosystems, pest control, pollination strategies, environmental factors.

As a curious mind, I am drawn to observing the intricate patterns of nature, particularly the resilience of C4 plants and their ecological roles in diverse habitats. Their adaptive mechanisms, including unique photosynthetic pathways, fascinate me when studying their interactions with pollinators in the fragmented landscapes of our world.
